positions.title: Full-Stack AI Engineer
description: Spearheading development of full-stack web applications with advanced AI integrations, managing end-to-end project lifecycle from requirement gathering to cloud deployment.
Architecting secure backends with JWT authentication, React frontends, and optimized PostgreSQL databases for complex AI data flows.

positions.title: Programmer Analyst Trainee
description: Completed intensive training in ASP.NET Core Web API and enterprise-level software development.
Applied .NET stack principles to internal projects within large-scale, service-oriented architectures.

positions.title: AI Research Intern
description: Contributed to Bioinformatics R&D focused on AI-driven drug discovery.
Collaborated on multi-modal architectures to improve prediction reliability for healthcare applications.

positions.title: AI Intern
description: Developed an AI-driven prototype for automated hydroponics using real-time sensor data for a Netherlands-based client.
Built a deep learning model to predict nutrient uptake values, bridging hardware sensors with predictive software analysis.
